productDisplayName: Classic Polo Men's Blue Stripe T-shirt
description: Composition:100% polo t-shirt in blue with yellow and grey stripes. Made of finest PC dyed yarns, single jersey three buttons polo tee without pocket and with slits at the bottom.Wash care:Machine wash separately in cold water. Use mild detergent. Do not bleach. Avoid soaking. Remove promptly. Line dry inside out in shade. Warm iron only.
